what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment that references a board item.
observations: YAML frontmatter only; no body content.
Attachment id att-199cda1a in the dragnet-development channel.
standouts: It is a cross-reference stub linking a channel attachment to a board item via a board:// URI.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Target uses a board:// URI scheme.
concerns: No content beyond metadata; purpose depends on the external board item.
notes: A minimal channel-attachment metadata stub pointing to board item cdcd3903.
questions: What content or discussion does the referenced board item hold?
Is the attachment expected to be rendered inline or only indexed?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated as a board_items attachment; actual content is only a reference stub, so purpose is fulfilled as a pointer.
intention_signals: To create a durable, timestamped record associating a channel attachment with a specific board item.
contribution: Provides a stable, file-local attachment record with a typed link to a board item, enabling indexing and retrieval by attachment id, channel, and target.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment metadata file of type board_items that references board item cdcd3903 in the dragnet-development channel.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a link between a channel attachment and a board item for later lookup or rendering.
